name: Viper Energy, Inc.
business: Viper Energy, Inc. owns mineral and royalty interests in oil and natural gas properties, primarily in the Permian Basin. The company generates revenue from its share of production by operators and does not have any employees; all services are provided by Diamondback Energy, Inc. The company sells oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids at market prices.

exposures.sentence: Our properties are located primarily in the Midland and Delaware Basins of the Permian Basin in Texas.

catalysts.sentence: On February 18, 2026, our board of directors approved an increase in authorization under our existing repurchase program from $750 million to $1.75 billion, excluding excise tax.

On February 18, 2026, our board of directors approved (i) an increase to our annual base dividend to $1.52 per share of Class A Common Stock beginning with the dividend payable for the fourth quarter of 2025, and (ii) a combined quarterly base and variable cash dividend of $0.52 per share of Class A Common Stock and $0.65 per OpCo Unit payable on March 12, 2026.
On February 9, 2026, we completed the Non-Permian Divestiture for net cash proceeds of approximately $617 million, subject to customary post-closing adjustments.

On August 19, 2025, we completed the Sitio Acquisition in an all-equity transaction valued at approximately $4.0 billion, including customary transaction costs and post-closing adjustments and the partial retirement of Sitio's net debt of approximately $1.2 billion.

On May 1, 2025, we completed the 2025 Drop Down for consideration consisting of (i) $873 million in cash including customary post-closing adjustments, and (ii) the issuance of 69,626,640 OpCo Units and an equivalent number of shares of our Class B Common Stock.
